official_public_docs_or_observed_endpoin: Observed Applitrack Output.asp?all=1 plus JobPostings/view.asp detail pages.
source_discovery_method: use configured agency/board URL and official/list endpoint where visible
detail_fetch_method: detail fetch for date/location only when fixture-backed and polite
pagination_method: respect source page controls; do not brute-force ids
canonical_url_rule: use source canonical/apply URL, absolutize relative URLs, strip tracking noise, and keep stable path identity
source_job_id_rule: url-or-title-inference: applyFor/listing URL id is recoverable.
title_company_rule: reject rows missing title, company context, or usable canonical/apply URL; reject placeholders and blank titles
location_text_rule: detail-page: Saved raw detail fixture covers Applitrack detail-page location recovery when Output.asp omits it.
country_region_city_rule: detail-page: Saved raw detail fixture covers Applitrack detail-page location recovery when Output.asp omits it.
remote_type_rule: detail-page: Saved raw detail fixture covers explicit remote/hybrid/on-site text from detail body.
posting_date_rule: detail-page: Saved raw detail fixture covers Applitrack detail-page Date Posted recovery when Output.asp omits it.
rate_limit: strict public-board rate limit with long cooldown after 429/403

quality_threshold.public_write_rule: certified parser exists, but live quality gaps require quarantine/detail-refetch before broad public writes

quarantine_reason: hold/quarantine recommendation: high missing normalized geo; high weak remote classification

runner_interface.writeAccepted: source runner accepted path updates public read model only after validation
runner_interface.writeQuarantine: source runner quarantine path records reason and keeps row out of public index

next_action: add or run bounded detail-refetch certification for missing geo/remote evidence
certification_blockers: high missing normalized geo; high weak remote classification
